home.heroSubtitle: Capturing unforgettable moments — DOTE introductions, weddings, birthdays, funerals, graduations & corporate events across all of Rwanda.
home.platformDesc: NY Entertainment Rwanda is a professional event media company covering weddings, DOTE ceremonies, birthdays, funerals, graduations, and corporate events across all 30 districts of Rwanda.
home.platformDesc2: From cinematic videography and aerial drone coverage to live streaming and photo booths — we provide end-to-end media production that preserves your most important moments forever.
home.searchAcross: Search across videos, posts, creators, couples and events
home.jumpDirectly: Jump directly to what you need
home.servicesDesc: Everything you need for a perfect event – professional, reliable, and tailored to your needs.
home.weddingMomentsDesc: Every part of your wedding, beautifully covered
home.noVideosYet: No videos yet. Videos uploaded by couples and creators will appear here.
home.topCreatorsDesc: The most viewed and followed creators on our platform
home.supportImpactText: "Your support helps couples preserve their precious memories and earn from their love stories. Every contribution goes directly to supporting Rwandan couples and their families."
home.noLiveEvents: No live events at the moment
home.recentGalleriesDesc: Beautiful photo galleries from recent events
home.downloadAppDesc: Coming soon to Android and iOS
home.topCreatorsDesc2: The talented team behind every shot
home.contactUs: Contact us today — pricing is negotiable and we'll work within your budget.
home.step1Desc: Sign up and build your profile
home.premiumContentDesc: Subscribe to access premium cinematic wedding films, full ceremony recordings, and exclusive behind-the-scenes content.
home.becomeFeaturedCoupleDesc: Share your love story, get a dedicated wedding page, and earn from premium video views and sponsorships.
home.becomeCreatorDesc: Showcase your work, get bookings through our platform, and earn from events, tips, and premium content.
home.stayUpdatedDesc: Subscribe to get updates on new events, offers, and featured videos
home.getInTouchDesc: We're ready to cover your next event
home.post1Excerpt: Discover the hottest wedding styles taking over Kigali this season.
home.post2Title: How to Plan Your DOTE Ceremony
home.post2Excerpt: Everything you need to know about Rwanda's beautiful introduction ceremony.
home.post3Title: Behind the Lens: Our Camera Gear
home.post3Excerpt: A look at the professional equipment we use to capture your moments.
home.review1: Amazing! The video captured every emotion perfectly. We cry every time we watch it.
home.review2: Beautiful tribute for our father. They preserved his memory with such dignity.
home.review3: The birthday video was incredible! Everyone was blown away by the quality.
home.cinematicQualityDesc: Every event filmed like a movie — rich colors, smooth motion
home.fastDeliveryDesc: Highlight reels within 48 hours, full video in 2–4 weeks
home.modernEquipmentDesc: 4K cameras, gimbals, pro lighting & audio gear
home.allRwandaDesc: We travel to all 30 districts — no event too far
home.flexiblePricingDesc: Negotiable packages — we work within your budget
home.faq1a: DOTE is Rwanda's traditional introduction ceremony where the groom's family formally requests the bride's hand in marriage, with gift presentation, family speeches, and cultural dances.
home.faq2q: How do I book an event?
home.faq2a: Click 'Book Event Now' on any section. Choose your event type, fill in details, and submit. Our team reviews within 24 hours and contacts you with pricing.
home.faq3a: Highlight reels: 48 hours. Full videos: 2–4 weeks depending on event size and package selected.
home.faq4q: Do you cover events outside Kigali?
home.faq4a: Yes! We cover all 30 districts of Rwanda. Travel costs may apply for distant locations.
home.faq5q: Can I pay a deposit first?
home.faq5a: Yes. A deposit is required to confirm your booking. Full payment is completed after admin approval and before the event date.
home.faq6q: What's included in the Full Package?
home.faq6a: Complete DOTE, Church, and Reception coverage, drone shots, two videographers, same-day highlight reel, and full cinematic film.

about.title: About NY Entertainment Rwanda
about.subtitle: Rwanda's Premier Event Media Platform
about.ourStoryText: NY Entertainment Rwanda was founded with a simple mission: to preserve Rwanda's most beautiful moments through cinematic storytelling. What started as a passion for capturing weddings has grown into a full-service event media company covering DOTE ceremonies, birthdays, funerals, graduations, and corporate events across all 30 districts of Rwanda.
about.ourStoryText2: We believe every event tells a unique story. Our team of professional videographers, photographers, and editors work together to create films that families will treasure for generations.
about.ourMissionText: To provide world-class event media services that celebrate Rwandan culture, preserve family memories, and empower creators, couples, and businesses through high-quality storytelling.
about.teamLeadDesc: With over 10 years of experience in event media, Abel leads our creative vision.
about.teamCreativeDesc: Bringing artistic vision to every project with a passion for storytelling.
about.teamEditorDesc: Crafting cinematic narratives that capture the emotion of every event.
about.whyChooseUsDesc: We combine technical excellence with cultural understanding to create films that truly matter.
about.missionText: To preserve every couple's unique love story through cinematic wedding videography, making professional wedding films accessible to all couples in Rwanda.
about.leaderBio1: Visionary leader with over 8 years of experience in the creative industry. Yves founded NY Entertainment Rwanda with a mission to revolutionize wedding storytelling in Rwanda.
about.leaderBio2: Creative designer and developer responsible for the platform's look and feel. Abel ensures every couple gets a beautiful digital experience.
about.teamSubtitle: Meet the talented people behind NY Entertainment Rwanda
about.teamBio1: Expert in storytelling and creative direction for wedding films.
about.teamBio2: Professional video editor specializing in wedding highlights and documentaries.
about.teamBio3: Ensures every client receives personalized attention and excellent customer service.
about.teamBio4: Master cinematographer with an eye for capturing emotional moments.
about.teamBio5: Responsible for brand growth and connecting with couples across Rwanda.
about.storyText1: NY Entertainment Rwanda started in 2020 with a simple goal: to give every couple access to professional wedding videography at affordable, negotiable prices. Based in Kamonyi, we've grown to serve couples across all districts of Rwanda, capturing beautiful love stories from traditional DOTE ceremonies to church weddings and reception celebrations.
about.storyText2: What makes us different? We believe every love story is unique and deserves to be told authentically. Our team combines technical expertise with genuine passion for storytelling, ensuring your wedding film reflects who you are as a couple.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Love Story?
about.ctaText: Contact us today for a free consultation and custom quote

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with NY Entertainment Rwanda
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
contact.successText: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.faq1q: How do I book a wedding videography session?
contact.faq1a: Simply fill out the booking form on our Book page, select your package, choose your date, and submit. You'll receive a confirmation within 24 hours.
contact.faq2a: We offer Traditional Wedding (DOTE), Church Wedding, Reception Coverage, and Full Wedding Package.
contact.faq3a: Abamararungu is a traditional Rwandan cultural dancer who performs at weddings. You can add this option when booking.
contact.faq4a: Yes, we cover weddings across all districts of Rwanda. Travel fees may apply.
contact.faq5q: How long does video editing take?
contact.faq5a: Editing typically takes 2-4 weeks after the wedding date.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we protect your data
privacy.intro: At NY Entertainment Rwanda, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and any content you upload. We also collect usage data to improve our services.
privacy.section2Text: We use your data to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, process payments, and personalize your experience.
privacy.section3Text: We implement security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section4Text: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. Contact us for assistance.
privacy.section5Text: We use cookies to improve your experience on our platform. You can control cookie settings in your browser.
privacy.section6Text: If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please contact us at nyentertainmentrwanda@gmail.com
privacy.section7Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please don't hesitate to contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully
terms.intro: Welcome to NY Entertainment Rwanda. By using our platform, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section1Text: By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. We may update these terms at any time.
terms.section2Text: NY Entertainment Rwanda provides professional event media services including but not limited to:
terms.section3Text: All bookings are subject to availability. A deposit may be required to confirm your booking. Prices are negotiable and will be confirmed in writing before service delivery.
terms.paymentNote: Full payment is required before the event date. Payment plans can be arranged upon request.
terms.section4Text: We understand that plans can change. Our cancellation policy is as follows:
terms.cancelNoneDesc: Less than 14 days before event - non-refundable
terms.section5Text: As a user of our services, you agree to:
terms.responsibility2: Communicate any changes or special requests in a timely manner
terms.responsibility3: Ensure access to the event venue for our team
terms.responsibility4: Respect our team members and follow safety guidelines
terms.section6Text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate services if we believe you have violated these terms. You may also cancel your booking according to our cancellation policy.
terms.section7Text: NY Entertainment Rwanda reserves the right to update or modify these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or through our website.
terms.section8Text: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
